title: Payroll Entries
subtitle: Manage employee payroll entries and calculations
search_placeholder: Search by employee name, number, or period...

actions.generate_entries_tooltip: Generate payroll entries from attendance data

no_entries.title: No payroll entries found
no_entries.empty_message: Get started by creating your first payroll entry

delete.confirm_text: You won't be able to revert this!

success.payslip_downloaded: Payslip PDF has been downloaded successfully.
success.excel_exported: Payroll entries have been exported to Excel successfully.

generate.title: Generate Payroll Entries
generate.subtitle: Create payroll entries automatically from approved attendance records
generate.period_hint: Attendance data will be pulled from the period's date range
generate.departments_hint: Select departments to filter employees, or leave empty to include all departments
generate.groups_hint: Select employee groups to filter employees, or leave empty to include all groups
generate.employees_hint: Select specific employees, or leave empty to include all employees matching the above filters
generate.error_load_data: Failed to load data for payroll generation.

export_modal.title: Export Payroll Entries
export_modal.description: Choose the export format for your payroll data
export_modal.normal_format_desc: Standard CSV export with complete payroll information
export_modal.normal_format_includes: Employee Name, Employee No, Period, Hours, Gross Pay, Deductions, Net Pay, Status, and more
export_modal.poweroffice_format_desc: Specialized format for Power Office Go import
export_modal.poweroffice_format_includes: EmployeeNo, PayItemCode, Rate, Amount, Quantity (Total Hours)
